message:
🐛 Fix cache compliance test with soft navigation (#1555)

- Add useSearchParams hook to CompliancePerfTest for reactive URL-based
  batch switching without full page reloads
- Expose window.__COMPLIANCE_SET_BATCH__ for e2e tests to trigger
  client-side batch switches preserving React Query in-memory cache
- Add softNavigateToBatch() helper using the exposed setter
- Add captureWarmSnapshotsResilient() using Playwright-side polling
  immune to execution context destruction during SPA navigation
- Mock all skipPattern routes to prevent 401→handle401() auth redirects
- Result: 100% cache hit rate across all 179 cards in 8 batches

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
